title: Common Sense Majority
description: Canonical Common Sense Majority mission content that should be uploaded with the formal seed statements.

statements.text: I think most people who currently identify as left-wing or right-wing are basically normal sane people with common-sense views who have more in common with each other than our extremely-polarized political/cultural environment implies, and I want to see this quiet middle majority recognize itself as a majority and gain more influence.
